name: Spinach-Feta Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a coffee filter or double thickness of paper towel in a fine-mesh strainer set over a bowl. Squeeze the yogurt through the filter into the bowl. Refrigerate until set, about 2 hours (you should have about 1 1/3 cups).
2. Press the spinach between your palms to squeeze out excess liquid.
3. In a food processor, pulse garlic and dill until finely chopped. Add the squeezed spinach, crumbled feta cheese, lemon rind, black pepper, and salt. Pulse until the mixture is finely grated and combined.
4. With the machine running, pulse in the drained yogurt to combine just until mixed.
5. Transfer the dip to a serving bowl (Laura's note: I like to serve it in a hollowed-out bread boule) and serve.
